## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible result.

## Scope

- Composition or document:
- Frames or scenes affected:
- Product claim changed: yes/no
- New asset or dependency: yes/no

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Representative frames inspected at 1920x1080
- [ ] Synthetic and simulated data remains labeled
- [ ] Asset ownership or permission recorded

## Risk

List remaining visual, technical, licensing, or claim risk.
